problem: What membrane material filters all contaminants from water at low energy cost?
hypothesis: If Perovskite crystal structure optimization is applied to low, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: In vitro biocompatibility assay with 14 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
